name: George Clinton
description: American singer, songwriter, bandleader, and music producer
abstract: George Edward Clinton (born July 22, 1941) is an American singer, songwriter, record producer, and bandleader. His Parliament-Funkadelic collective (which primarily recorded under the distinct band names Parliament and Funkadelic) developed an influential and eclectic form of funk music during the 1970s that drew on Afrofuturism, outland…

about_quotes.speaker: Pigeons Playing Ping Pong- Gator & Ben
about_quotes.evidence: I would say kind of like if Phish, Red Hot Chili Peppers and Talking Heads had a baby with George Clinton.
about_quotes.doc_title: Pigeons Playing Ping Pong- Gator & Ben interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, March 8, 2024

about_quotes.speaker: Fred Wesley
about_quotes.evidence: I think George kind of learned a lot from him. ... So that’s the way George Clinton is too you know.
about_quotes.doc_title: Fred Wesley interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, November 21, 2024

about_quotes.speaker: Jon Jang
about_quotes.evidence: we put over like a bass line that’s reminiscent of George Clinton.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jon Jang interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, September 17, 2003 [interview 1 of 2]
